_doc: Curated RSS/Atom feeds for the IC daily recap. Used by lib/feed_fetch.py — fetched directly via urllib (avoids WebFetch denylist). Mirrors the (b) bucket in sources.md.
_first_run_results: Verified 2026-05-10. Working: Ragan, PR Daily, Staffbase (/rss.xml — different path than the /blog/feed/ that returned malformed XML), Simpplr (/feed/ — root, not /blog/feed/). All 4 vendor feeds tested with feed_fetch.py against actual blog content. For competitors without a working RSS endpoint (Workvivo, ContactMonkey, Haiilo, Firstup, Davis & Co., LumApps, Poppulo), fall back to Step 2a's WebFetch on blog landing pages.
_cadence_notes: Re-audited 2026-05-10. All 4 active feeds live. Ragan ~3/day, PR Daily ~3/day, Simpplr ~weekly, Staffbase ~biweekly (so 7-day in_window=0 is normal for Staffbase, not a failure). Staffbase RSS items are not sorted chronologically — order in the feed is unrelated to publish date; rely on the parser's date sort.

_unverified_to_test.name: Workvivo blog
_unverified_to_test.note: 2026-05-10: no RSS exposed. Tried /feed/, /feed.xml, /blog/feed/, /blog/feed.xml, /blog/rss.xml, /blog/index.xml, blog.workvivo.com/feed/ — all 404 or HTML. Site is JS-rendered (Next.js). Use WebFetch fallback.

_unverified_to_test.name: ContactMonkey
_unverified_to_test.note: 2026-05-10: WordPress site explicitly disabled RSS (/feed/ and /blog/feed/ return HTTP 410 wp_die). No alternate path. Use WebFetch fallback.

_unverified_to_test.name: Haiilo blog
_unverified_to_test.note: 2026-05-10: Cloudflare 403 blocks all feed paths regardless of User-Agent. Even if a feed exists, feed_fetch.py's urllib won't get past the JS challenge. Use WebFetch fallback.

_unverified_to_test.name: Firstup blog
_unverified_to_test.note: 2026-05-10: Next.js site, no RSS. Tried /feed/, /blog/feed/, /blog/rss.xml, /blog/feed.xml, /blog/index.xml — all return Next.js 404 page. No feed advertised in HTML head. Use WebFetch fallback.

_unverified_to_test.name: Davis & Co.
_unverified_to_test.note: 2026-05-10: server returns HTTP 200 with HTML for every /feed/, /blog/feed/, /blog.atom, /insights/feed path — no real RSS endpoint exists, just SPA catch-all. Use WebFetch fallback.

_unverified_to_test.name: LumApps blog
_unverified_to_test.note: 2026-05-10: Webflow site, no RSS. Tried /blog/rss.xml, /learn/blog/rss.xml, /learn/feed/, /feed/, /rss.xml, /blog.atom — all 404. Webflow doesn't auto-generate feeds. Use WebFetch fallback.

_unverified_to_test.name: Poppulo blog
_unverified_to_test.note: 2026-05-10: Sanity CMS site, no RSS. Tried /blog/feed/, /feed/, /blog/rss.xml, /feed.xml, /blog.atom, /resources/feed — all 404. Sanity has no built-in RSS. Use WebFetch fallback.
